author: terencechain
content: agree.. no need to complicate it.. 4s should be fine.. but ya i think this is a prysm bug, our submission end point is too slow, not sure wtf it's doing

author: pk910
content:
It might be gossip relates.  Buildoor on buildoor-prysm-ethrex-1 reports that the envelope submission call takes ~600-800ms avg.
But on another buildoor instance the payloads only arrive ~1100-1500 ms after submission.
When starting to reveal at 4s ,  + 1.5s till other nodes see the payload is quite close to the 6s mark

author: terencechain
content: ya i already found the bug, for some reason we fully verify and import the payload before we broadcast them 😅

author: terencechain
content: fixed and triggered a new build
